data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a deposit for expensive services, specifically color services. However, the evidence does not include any information regarding the implementation of deposits for such services. The only financial evidence provided relates to completed transactions without any mention of deposits, indicating a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of deposit requirement for expensive services (color).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify deposit requirement for color services
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check if a deposit is required for color services.
